title: Daoist Canon: Wuzhen Pian (Awakening to Reality) (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Wuzhen Pian (Awakening to Reality)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Wuzhen Pian (Awakening to Reality)

translation.text: From the Wuzhen Pian (Awakening to Reality) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
